title: Woman's in-laws asking her to adjust in marriage is not cruelty: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court recently held that a man's relatives cannot be prosecuted for marital cruelty merely because they advised his wife to either “adjust” in the marriage or return to her parental home [Arti Mehta v. State of Madhya Pradesh].A Bench of Justices Sanjay Karol and N Kotiswar Singh added that although such conduct may be morally questionable, it cannot automatically be elevated to the status of a criminal act. The Court made the observation while quashing cruelty, domestic violence and
